title: Black Inventory Gui
description: A Black Inventory Gui for Creative, Survival, Menu etc... Feels Like Dark Mode For Minecraft
body:
A **black inventory gui** for better confort it **effects all guis** like anvil, becon, menu etc... I got the idea from the reasource pack called **Vanilla+ V2 by Marlowww** and the white normal gui **won't flash bang u at night**

-**Recomend The Newest Versions Like (V1.0), More Fixes**

**Fonts:**
- **Marlows Font**("Version"_V1.0_Marlows_Font)
- **Normal Font**("Version"_V1.0)
